methods.name: deposit
methods.desc:
@dev Deposit funds into the contract. The caller must send (for ETH) or approve (for ERC20) value equal to or `denomination` of this instance.
@param _commitment the note commitment, which is PedersenHash(nullifier + secret)

methods.name: withdraw
methods.desc:
@dev Withdraw a deposit from the contract. `proof` is a zkSNARK proof data, and input is an array of circuit public inputs
`input` array consists of:
- merkle root of all deposits in the contract
- hash of unique deposit nullifier to prevent double spends
- the recipient of funds
- optional fee that goes to the transaction sender (usually a relay)

methods.name: isSpent
methods.desc: @dev whether a note is already spent

methods.name: isKnownRoot
methods.desc: @dev Whether the root is present in the root history

methods.name: zeros
methods.desc: @dev provides Zero (Empty) elements for a MiMC MerkleTree. Up to 32 levels

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Merkle tree is full. No more leaves can be added
Message value is supposed to be zero for ETH instance
Please send `mixDenomination` ETH along with transaction
Refund value is supposed to be zero for ETH instance
The note has been already spent
